title: List of metropolitan areas in Spain
content: This is a list of the largest metropolitan areas in Spain by population. Estimates are from the following sources: The figures differ between the reports due to the difference in survey dates and differences in methodology. For example, ESPON considers Oviedo – Gijón – Avilés as a single FUA, while Urban Audit has separate LUZs for Oviedo and Gijón. Similarly, Vilanova i la Geltrú is included in Barcelona metropolitan area by ESPON, but as a separate conurbation by Ruiz.
